content.text: {"title":"Client creates user record","slug":"client-creates-user-record","intent":"An API client needs to add users through the service API.","story":"The client posts user details to the users endpoint.","expected_behavior":"The API creates the user and returns the new record.","boundaries":"This story does not cover updating users.","auditable_claims":["The create user route is user-facing."],"evidence":{"tests":[],"surface":["route: POST /api/users"],"docs":[]}}
